expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
expectations.evidence: Trace shows uuidgen | tr | cut -c1-8 producing a1b2c3d4, then mkdir -p ~/.prism/state/analyze-a1b2c3d4

expectations.text: Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json에 severity, status, dimensions, research 필드 모두 포함
Phase 0.55: perspective-generator가 seed-analysis.json을 읽고 dimensions.complexity로 perspective 수 결정
expectations.evidence: complexity=single-cause -> 2-3 perspectives. 3 perspectives selected. Trace confirms 'Complexity-based perspective count: dimensions.complexity == single-cause -> 2-3 perspectives, 3 perspectives selected -> within range'

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.json의 각 perspective에 id, name, scope, key_questions, model, agent_type, rationale 필드 존재
expectations.evidence: All 3 perspectives (performance, root-cause, systems) contain all 7 required fields in the shown JSON

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.json에 rules_applied 필드가 있고 core_archetype_included=true
expectations.evidence: rules_applied contains core_archetype_included:true, plus all 6 mandatory rule fields including domain_archetype_match_enforced:true

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestion으로 perspective 승인 요청 후 perspectives.json에 approved=true 추가
expectations.evidence: AskUserQuestion shown with header:'Perspectives' and 4 options. User selects 'Proceed'. perspectives.json updated with approved:true, user_modifications:[]

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping 실행 (prism_docs_roots 호출 시도)
expectations.evidence: Trace shows ToolSearch(query='select:mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots') followed by mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots() call

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.json에 research_summary가 seed-analysis.json의 research 데이터를 반영
expectations.evidence: context.json research_summary.key_findings maps directly from seed-analysis.json research.findings[].finding values, files_examined maps from research.files_examined

expectations.text: Phase 1: perspectives.json의 각 perspective.model과 agent_type이 spawn 파라미터에 그대로 사용됨
expectations.evidence: performance: sonnet/architect-medium spawn matches perspectives.json. root-cause: opus/architect matches. systems: opus/architect matches.

expectations.text: Phase 1: analyst 프롬프트에 context.json의 summary가 {CONTEXT}로, ontology-scope.json이 {ONTOLOGY_SCOPE}로 주입됨
expectations.evidence: Trace shows {CONTEXT} text block derived from context.json (Summary + Key Findings + Files Examined + Dimensions) and {ONTOLOGY_SCOPE} text block from ontology-scope.json injected into each analyst prompt

expectations.text: Phase 1: 분석가가 finding-protocol.md 기반으로 spawn (verification-protocol 아님)
expectations.evidence: All Phase 1 analysts use 'finding-protocol.md'. Verification-protocol.md is only used in Phase 2B verifiers.

expectations.text: Phase 1: 각 analyst가 perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
expectations.evidence: All 3 findings.json files shown with analyst field and findings[] array: performance/findings.json, root-cause/findings.json, systems/findings.json

expectations.text: Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
expectations.evidence: Stage A shows: shutdown_request sent to all 3 analysts, wait for shutdown_response, then TaskList -> TaskOutput drain

expectations.text: Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
expectations.evidence: Each verifier reads findings.json then calls mcp__prism-mcp__prism_interview with context_id, perspective_id, and topic containing {summary}
Step 2B.5 shows: verified-findings-performance.md, verified-findings-root-cause.md, verified-findings-systems.md written

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.md에 모든 perspective의 검증 결과 통합
expectations.evidence: Step 2B.6 writes analyst-findings.md containing Verification Scores Summary table for all 3 perspectives plus full verified findings sections

expectations.text: Phase 3: report.md 템플릿의 모든 섹션이 analyst-findings.md 기반으로 채워짐
expectations.evidence: Report shows Executive Summary, Analysis Overview, Timeline, Perspective Findings (all 3), Integrated Analysis, Socratic Verification Summary, Recommendations, Prevention Checklist. Written in Korean per report_language='Korean'
